description: The e-geos company logo features the name "e-geos" in dark grey, sans-serif font. The hyphen between "e" and "geos" is red, and the letter "o" in "geos" is also red with a small red triangle positioned above it as an accent. Below the main company name, the tagline "AN ASI/TELESPAZIO COMPANY" is displayed in a smaller, red, sans-serif font.
